name: Spermidine
summary: Dietary polyamine supplement tracked for autophagy induction, with human safety and biomarker studies plus a null longer-duration memory trial.
mechanism_summary: Polyamine supplementation is proposed to support autophagy and stress-response biology, but current human evidence is mixed and formulation-dependent.

open_questions: Whether higher-purity or different-dose formulations can produce reliable pathway engagement
Whether any cognitive or functional signal can replicate beyond exploratory findings
